name: @patch-cat/mcp
description: An MCP server that lets your AI assistant build and remember its own Python tools — and pulls from a public registry of tools shaped by every Patch user.

tools.name: patch_generate_tool
tools.description: Generate or pull a tool that fulfills a description.

tools.name: patch_run_tool
tools.description: Explicitly invoke a tool by name.

tools.name: patch_list_tools
tools.description: List every tool in the local toolbox.

tools.name: patch_confirm_action
tools.description: Approve a tool call previously blocked by tainted-input or human-confirm gating.

tools.name: patch_list_runs
tools.description: List recent tool execution runs from the local audit log.

tools.name: patch_replay
tools.description: Replay a recorded run; reports output_match yes/no/n_a-non-deterministic.

tools.name: patch_auth_register
tools.description: Authorize this Patch instance for registry contribution or external-service auth.

tools.name: patch_auth_status
tools.description: Show registry read/contribute status and external_auth state.
